# Englivo

Premium 1-on-1 English tutoring platform for fluency and confidence.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://englivo.com/)
- [Method](https://englivo.com/method)
- [Pricing](https://englivo.com/pricing)
- [How it Works](https://englivo.com/how-it-works)
- [FAQ](https://englivo.com/faq)

## About
Englivo provides personalized English coaching with a focus on natural fluency, professional communication, and confidence building.

## Technical SEO Pages
Our SEO landing pages are managed via Sanity CMS and localized in 6 languages.
- [Sitemap](https://englivo.com/sitemap.xml)
